transcription.text: Here within the cap of the all-new Parker 51, you'll find the world's smoothest writing pen point. It's Parker's exclusive new electro-polished point. The point that's made mirror smooth in an electro-bath, which dissolves all the microscopic burrs and ridges found on ordinary points. The electro-polished Parker point is the smoothest you ever touch to paper. Try it tomorrow. The beautiful, all-new, electro-polished Parker 51. World's smoothest writing pen.

segments.text: Here within the cap of the all-new Parker 51, you'll find the world's smoothest writing pen point.
It's Parker's exclusive new electro-polished point.
The point that's made mirror smooth in an electro-bath,
which dissolves all the microscopic burrs and ridges found on ordinary points.
The electro-polished Parker point is the smoothest you ever touch to paper.
